steps.title: Use the despite contrast
steps.content: The phrase "despite stated claims" sets up a contrast with the criticism that follows: the research had a myopic focus on only a few countries. The blank must mean broad or complete coverage, the opposite of narrow scope.

steps.title: Reject unrelated qualities
steps.content: A concerns newness, not scope. B means unchangeability, which does not contrast with a narrow geographic focus. D means widespread presence, not comprehensive research coverage. The needed noun means thorough completeness. The answer is C.
